Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}It appears they are growing well. Hip hip hooray, as they say.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}The ladybug has grown into a fine adult as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I believe this is "mission complete." Well done, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I tried to do everything in my power. I'm glad I was of service.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}The ladybug put in a lot of work as well. We thank you for your service![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}That's true. We must be prepared for surprise attacks.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}That reminds me, Junpei-san came here the other day trying to get some free samples, but I quickly gunned him down.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}If he comes back, rest assured, he will be shot on sight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}But, it's thanks to the ladybug that the plants didn't suffer any significant damage.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I will thank it for its service in your place, {f 4 2}-san![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I've realized something, tending these plants alongside you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I've made many new discoveries beside these planters.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Everyone is doing the best they can to make their way in the world.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}That goes for the plants, and the pests, and the ladybug too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I may be a machine, but I also want to do the best I can.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I will do my best to make my way in the world, just like everyone else.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}That is my new goal from now on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}I am impressed, {f 4 2}-san. I hadn't expected a competition here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Hearing that, my motivation is fully charged! ...As they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}It's difficult to explain, but I will do my best in everyday life, as well as in battle against the Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}All for one and one for all! Let's go team! ...As they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis seems to have found a new[n]purpose through tending the plants...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Naturally, I will still continue to look after them at full throttle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Let's get started right away.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like they're going to grow nicely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Once again, our mission has concluded without incident today. Let's head back now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}It looks like they're growing quite nicely. I'm amazed at how robust they are.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}The ladybug has grown into a fine adult as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Does this mean our mission is complete? That's a job well done, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}I did my best to do everything in my power. I'm happy I was able to assist.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}...Oh, and we can't forget to thank the ladybug for contributing as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}That's true. We still need to watch out for birds and other animals.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}...But, maybe it will be okay to share a little with them, as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}...That just shows that the ladybug has been hard at work, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}I'll go ahead and express our gratitude to it. Thank you, little ladybug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}As I've tended these plants alongside you, I've realized something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}I've made so many new discoveries beside these planters.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Everyone is doing the best they can to make their way in the world.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}That goes for the plants, the pests, and the ladybug, too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}I may be a machine, but I also want to do the best I can.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}I'll give it my all to make my way in the world, just like everyone else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}But, hearing that from you is making me even more motivated.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}It's okay. I'm not going to act on my own anymore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}I just want to do a little bit to protect everyone's futures.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis seems to have found a new[n]purpose through tending the plants...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Of course, I don't plan on sacrificing my attention here either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like they're going to grow nicely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}I think we did another thorough job today. Shall we head back now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}It appears they are growing well. Hip hip hooray, as they say.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}The ladybug has grown into a fine adult as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I believe this is "mission complete." Well done, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I tried to do everything in my power. I'm glad I was of service.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}The ladybug put in a lot of work as well. We thank you for your service![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}That's true. We must be prepared for surprise attacks.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}That reminds me, Junpei-san came here the other day trying to get some free samples, but I quickly gunned him down.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}If he comes back, rest assured, he will be shot on sight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}But, it's thanks to the ladybug that the plants didn't suffer any significant damage.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I will thank it for its service in your place, {f 4 2}-san![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I've realized something, tending these plants alongside you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I've made many new discoveries beside these planters.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Everyone is doing the best they can to make their way in the world.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}That goes for the plants, and the pests, and the ladybug too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I may be a machine, but I also want to do the best I can.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I will do my best to make my way in the world, just like everyone else.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}That is my new goal from now on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}I am impressed, {f 4 2}-san. I hadn't expected a competition here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Hearing that, my motivation is fully charged! ...As they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}It's difficult to explain, but I will do my best in everyday life, as well as in battle against the Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}All for one and one for all! Let's go team! ...As they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis seems to have found a new[n]purpose through tending the plants...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Naturally, I will still continue to look after them at full throttle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Let's get started right away.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like they're going to grow nicely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Once again, our mission has concluded without incident today. Let's head back now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}It looks like they're growing very well. I'm amazed at how robust they are.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}The ladybug has grown into a fine adult as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Does this mean our mission is complete? That's a job well done, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}I did my best to do everything in my power. I'm happy I was able to assist.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}...Oh, and we can't forget to thank the ladybug for contributing as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}That's true. We still need to watch out for birds and other animals.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}...But, maybe it will be okay to share a little with them, as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}...That just shows that the ladybug has been hard at work, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}I'll go ahead and express our gratitude to it. Thank you, little ladybug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}As I've tended these plants alongside you, I've realized something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}I've made so many new discoveries beside these planters.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Everyone is doing the best they can to make their way in the world.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}That goes for the plants, and the pests, and the ladybug too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}I may be a machine, but I also want to do the best I can.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}I'll give it my all to make my way in the world, just like everyone else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}...You're already working hard enough, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}But, hearing that from you is making me even more motivated.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}It's okay. I'm not going to act on my own anymore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}I just want to do a little bit to protect everyone's futures.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis seems to have found a new[n]purpose through tending the plants...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Of course, I don't plan on sacrificing my attention here either.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}Okay, it's time to get started![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like they're going to grow nicely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}I think we did another thorough job today. Shall we head back now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}It appears they are growing well. Hip hip hooray, as they say.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}The ladybug has grown into a fine adult as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I believe this is "mission complete." Well done, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I tried to do everything in my power. I'm glad I was of service.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}The ladybug put in a lot of work as well. We thank you for your service![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_068_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}That's true. We must be prepared for surprise attacks.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}That reminds me, Junpei-san came here the other day trying to get some free samples, but I quickly gunned him down.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}If he comes back, rest assured, he will be shot on sight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_069_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}But, it's thanks to the ladybug that the plants didn't suffer any significant damage.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I will thank it for its service in your place, {f 4 2}-san![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_070_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I've realized something, tending these plants alongside you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_071_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I've made many new discoveries beside these planters.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Everyone is doing the best they can to make their way in the world.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}That goes for the plants, and the pests, and the ladybug too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_072_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I may be a machine, but I also want to do the best I can.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I will do my best to make my way in the world, just like everyone else.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}That is my new goal from now on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_074_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}I am impressed, {f 4 2}-san. I hadn't expected a competition here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Hearing that, my motivation is fully charged! ...As they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_075_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}It's difficult to explain, but I will do my best in everyday life, as well as in battle against the Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}All for one and one for all! Let's go team! ...As they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_076_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis seems to have found a new[n]purpose through tending the plants...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_077_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Naturally, I will still continue to look after them at full throttle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Let's get started right away.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_078_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like they're going to grow nicely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_079_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Once again, our mission has concluded without incident today. Let's head back now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_080_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}It looks like they're growing very well. I'm amazed at how robust they are.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}The ladybug has grown into a fine adult as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_081_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Does this mean our mission is complete? That's a job well done, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_083_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}I did my best to do everything in my power. I'm happy I was able to assist.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}...Oh, and we can't forget to thank the ladybug for contributing as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_084_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}That's true. We still need to watch out for birds and other animals.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}...But, maybe it will be okay to share a little with them, as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_085_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}...That just shows that the ladybug has been hard at work, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}I'll go ahead and express our gratitude to it. Thank you, little ladybug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_086_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}As I've tended these plants alongside you, I've realized something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_087_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}I've made so many new discoveries beside these planters.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Everyone is doing the best they can to make their way in the world.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}That goes for the plants, and the pests, and the ladybug too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_088_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}I may be a machine, but I also want to do the best I can.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}I'll give it my all to make my way in the world, just like everyone else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_090_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}...You're already working hard enough, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}But, hearing that from you is making me even more motivated.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_091_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}It's okay. I'm not going to act on my own anymore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}I just want to do a little bit to protect everyone's futures.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_092_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis seems to have found a new[n]purpose through tending the plants...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_093_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Of course, I don't plan on sacrificing my attention here either.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}Okay, it's time to get started![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_094_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like they're going to grow nicely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_095_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}I think we did another thorough job today. Shall we head back now?[n]{f 1 1}
